description_long: This is a brown leather boat shoe with a moccasin-style toe and visible white stitching along the upper edge. The shoe features a lace-up design with metal eyelets and leather laces that run through side grommets, typical of classic deck shoes. The upper is constructed from smooth, dark brown leather, while the sole is a contrasting light brown rubber with a rugged, lugged tread for enhanced grip. Decorative stitching and metal rivets add to the shoe's durability and style. The interior appears to be lined with a softer material for comfort, and the heel is reinforced for additional support. This type of shoe is commonly worn in urban environments for casual or semi-casual occasions.
description: A brown leather boat shoe with white stitching, metal eyelets, and a rugged light brown rubber sole. Features a lace-up design and moccasin-style toe, ideal for casual urban wear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the reinforced heel, stitching details, and the top of the collar with visible laces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the lace threading through metal eyelets and grommets, as well as the full length of the lugged sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the moccasin-style toe, white stitching, and the arrangement of the laces.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side grommets, stitching, and the rugged sole profile.
